single_spawn_policy.goal: complete all feasible phase repair and validation attempts inside this one spawn
continue_without_confirmation: missing case_lib seed when phase policy permits bootstrap
spec uncertainty resolvable from C code and problem_context
terminal_blocked_only_for: phase skill declares the current task semantically impossible under current inputs
required toolchain completely unavailable after command evidence

state_reports.stale: report stale when source_version or source_goal_version is no longer current
state_reports.compact_error: report compact-error only as a compaction fact; controller/main decides retry or final blocker

single_spawn_policy.controller_acceptance_model: controller validates final candidate and evidence after spawn returns

handoff.rendered_instructions_compact:
Read /home/yangfp/QCIP/reports/xizi_avl_left_rotate-20260715125530/rounds/xizi_avl_left_rotate-vc-checking-r1/agent_input.json.
The goal is to complete the workflow task assigned by the input JSON; /home/yangfp/QCIP/reports/xizi_avl_left_rotate-20260715125530/rounds/xizi_avl_left_rotate-vc-checking-r1/agent_report.json is only the final report file recording the result.
Before acting, read the input JSON completely and read every skill or rule file listed in handoff.rules_source.
The input JSON, declared round worktree, declared source versions, and current files are the source of truth.
Do not rely on parent chat history or unstated assumptions as task context or evidence.
Minimize respawns: perform repair, retry, missing-file bootstrap, and alternative attempts inside this same spawn whenever the input versions are still current.
Do not stop for confirmation about optional context, missing bootstrap files, future proof difficulty, or recoverable tool feedback; make a conservative local choice and continue.
Work only in the declared round worktree; write only the declared report/output files and formal files allowed by allowed_write_paths.
No compromise operations: do not weaken specifications, bypass required checks, fake evidence, change generated files by hand, change witness statements to fit a proof, add Admitted/Axiom, use forbidden tools/tactics, or edit paths outside the handoff.
Task completion means the assigned phase work is completed under the strict workflow, with a terminal agent_result, required evidence, changed-files or blocker details, applicable source_version/source_goal_version, and an output note satisfying output_contract.
Controller acceptance is separate; do not mark yourself accepted or claim acceptance unless the controller writes it.
Reuse only previous_attempts, required_lessons, prior_failure_summaries, and output notes declared in the JSON; previous outputs are non-authoritative and lose conflicts to JSON, manifests, source versions, and current files.
Compact-error is not your blocked judgment; report it only as a compaction fact and let controller/main decide retry or final blocker.
If the strict workflow cannot be completed, write a blocked, stale, or compact-error result with concrete evidence instead of improvising around the process.

source_goal_version.digest_input_policy: relative_path+sha256+state+role over generated files and witness statements

problem_context.problem_statement: Reverify the AVL left-rotation function after replacing the case-local Rocq library with the shared QCIPLib/xizi/xizi_avl_common library. Final formal artifacts must have no active case-private xizi_avl_left_rotate_lib dependency.
problem_context.expected_behavior: Rewire root x with non-null right child y so y becomes the returned root, x.right becomes the old y.left, y.left becomes x, and all data, cached heights, and framed subtrees are preserved.
problem_context.input_output_contract: Predicate-first contract: Require store_addr_avl(avl_node,before), non-null root and right child, and exact before-tree shape; Ensure return is right child, store_addr_avl(return,after), and avl_left_rotation(before,after) for the exact rotated model.
spec_hint: Use addr_avl_tree, avl_node_model, store_addr_avl, avl_left_rotation, and the strategies from QCIPLib.xizi.xizi_avl_common only. Treat the controller-created case_lib as compatibility seed only; do not define, import, or rely on case-specific predicates/helpers in the C or generated proofs.
preferred_hidden_properties: Whole-tree store_addr_avl ownership with exact root/right-child model equation; expose node fields internally only through common unfold/fold strategies.
forbidden_patterns: No field-by-field public pre/postcondition, no case-private active lib, no algorithm-mirroring Rocq definition, no claim that the primitive restores cached height or global AVL/BST invariants.
reference_case_hints: Follow predicate-first style of QCP_demos_LLM single-linked-list cases; only QCP_demos_LLM references are allowed.

changed_files.summary: Switched to the shared AVL header, replaced field-by-field public ownership with whole-tree store_addr_avl, stated the exact rotation relation, and added one internal common-predicate Assert to expose the two node layers.
Removed all case-local model/spec declarations; retained only a compatibility Require Export of the shared xizi_avl_lib.

changed_files.note: The stale old manual was removed solely to let the canonical symexec create a fresh skeleton. The controller-owned deterministic diagnostics splitter is expected to remove generated split-goal Abort blocks during annotation-check-round.

hidden_properties: Whole-tree store_addr_avl ownership with exact root/right-child model equation; expose node fields internally only through common unfold/fold strategies.

grouping_basis: same proof pattern or helper family
manual witness order as deterministic tie-breaker
split_required_when: any proposed group would exceed 12 witnesses
proof strategies are unrelated enough to confuse one worker
